message: 🌱 Add distribution: [v3.0.0-alpha.1] Disable exporting traces by default mission (#657)

+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "distribution-4270-v3-0-0-alpha-1-disable-exporting-traces-by-default",

+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "distribution: [v3.0.0-alpha.1] Disable exporting traces by default",
+    "description": "[v3.0.0-alpha.1] Disable exporting traces by default. Requested by 34+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current distribution deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your distribution version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n distribution -l app.kubernetes.io/name=distribution\nhelm list -n distribution 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working distribution installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review distribution configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant distribution configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n distribution -l app.kubernetes.io/name=distribution\nkubectl get configmap -n distribution -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=distribution\n```\nI thought I would update my registries to the `3.0.0-alpha.1` for testing and I am seeing that it looks like the registry is trying to connect to an endpoint for tracing but I have not configured anything."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for [v3.0.0-alpha.1] Disable exporting traces by default",
+        "description": "Cherry pick PR #4047 to release/2.8 branch.\n```yaml\n2024/01/31 21:13:05 traces export: Post \"https://localhost:4318/v1/traces\": dial tcp 127.0.0.1:4318: connect: connection refused\n2024/01/31 21:13:10 traces export: Post \"https://localhost:4318/v1/traces\": dial tcp 127.0.0.1:4318: connect: connection refused\n2024/01/31 21:13:15 traces export: Post \"https://localhost:4318/v1/traces\": dial tcp 127.0.0.1:4318: connect: connection refused\n2024/01/31 21:13:42 traces export: Post \"https://localhost:4318/v1/traces\": dial tcp 127.0.0.1:4318: connect: connection refused\n2024/01/31 21:25:22 traces export: Post \"https://localhost:4318/v1/traces\": dial tcp\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n distribution -l app.kubernetes.io/name=distribution\nkubectl get events -n distribution --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"[v3.0.0-alpha.1] Disable exporting traces by default\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "See the linked issue and PR for the community-verified solution.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "2024/01/31 21:13:05 traces export: Post \"https://localhost:4318/v1/traces\": dial tcp 127.0.0.1:4318: connect: connection refused\n2024/01/31 21:13:10 traces export: Post \"https://localhost:4318/v1/traces\": dial tcp 127.0.0.1:4318: connect: connection refused\n2024/01/31 21:13:15 traces export: Post \"https://localhost:4318/v1/traces\": dial tcp 127.0.0.1:4318: connect: connection refused\n2024/01/31 21:13:42 traces export: Post \"https://localhost:4318/v1/traces\": dial tcp 127.0.0.1:4318: connect: connection refused\n2024/01/31 21:25:22 traces export: Post \"https://localhost:4318/v1/traces\": dial tcp 127.0.0.1:4318: connect: connection refused\n2024/01/31 21:25:27 traces export: Post \"https://localhost:4318/v1/traces\": dial tcp 127.0.0.1:4318: connect: connection refused\n2024/01/31 21:25:52 traces",
